nodes.name: 夏威夷群島
nodes.summary: 夏威夷群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Black francolin、纯褐鹱、Newell's shearwater等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 歐胡島
nodes.summary: 歐胡島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Hawaiian hawk、Oʻahu ʻelepaio、日本树莺等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Oʻahu ʻelepaio
nodes.summary: Oʻahu ʻelepaio（Oʻahu ʻelepaio，学名 Chasiempis ibidis），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于夏威夷群島、歐胡島。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |date=2009 |title=Importance of Nest Predation by Alien Rodents and Avian Poxvirus in Conservation of Oahu Elepaio |url=https://www.jstor.org/stable/40208434 |journal=The Journal of Wildlife Management |volume=73 |issue=5 |pages=737–746 |doi=10.2193/2008-284 |jstor=40208434 |bibcode=2009JWMan..73..737V |issn=0022-541X |via=JSTOR}} It is one of the three distinct, closely related species of elepaio native to the Hawaiian archipelago, including the Hawaii elepaio and the Kaui elepaio.{{Cite journal |last1=VanderWerf |first1=Eric A

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |date=2007 |title=Biogeography of 'Elepaio: Evidence from Inter-Island Song Playbacks |url=https://www.jstor.org/stable/20456016 |journal=The Wilson Journal of Ornithology |volume=119 |issue=3 |pages=325–333 |doi=10.1676/06-015.1 |jstor=20456016 |issn=1559-4491}} They are found in high elevations on the slopes of Oahu{{Cite journal |last1=Vanderwerf |first1=Eric A
